confirmed_facts: Section 608 is EPA/federal refrigerant regulation context.
Technician certification is relevant for work involving regulated refrigerants.
Certification categories commonly include Type I, Type II, Type III and Universal.
uncertain_facts: Exact exam provider and fee vary by provider.
State HVAC license requirements are separate and vary by jurisdiction.
do_not_claim: Do not claim EPA 608 replaces a state HVAC license.
Do not recommend uncertified refrigerant handling.
